questionHtml: Describe the trend in body posture as ambient temperature rises from 22 to 34 °C.
markschemeHtml:
As ambient temperature increases, the sloth spends more time with limbs spread
OR
as ambient temperature increases the sloth spends less time curled in a ball
OR
as ambient temperature rises, the posture changes from 1 to 6;

meta.title: Describe the trend in body posture as ambient temperature rises from 22 to 34 °C.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.3.1. Homeostasis as maintenance of the internal environment of an organism
